creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've been running poudriere in a jail for a few years now.

In an effort to help, I ran:

  sudo poudriere testport -j 141amd64 -p default -z primary mail/sympa

It built. Logs at https://services.unixathome.org/poudriere/build.html?mastername=141amd64-default-primary&build=2024-07-15_19h15m28s


My configuration settings are documented here:

https://dan.langille.org/2024/01/19/configuration-for-running-poudriere-in-a-jail-on-freebsd-14/
